diagrams.name: text_to_world_generation
diagrams.title: Text-to-World Generation
diagrams.description: User submits a text prompt and the pipeline produces a generated world video

diagrams.name: video_to_world_generation
diagrams.title: Video-to-World Generation
diagrams.description: User provides a conditioning video and the pipeline extends or generates a new world video

diagrams.name: multiview_world_generation
diagrams.title: Multiview World Generation
diagrams.description: System generates synchronized multi-camera viewpoint outputs from a single prompt or video

diagrams.name: long_video_generation_inference
diagrams.title: Long Video Generation (LVG) Inference
diagrams.description: User requests generation of extended-length video via video extension pipeline

diagrams.name: model_training_pipeline
diagrams.title: Model Training Pipeline
diagrams.description: ML Engineer launches and manages training runs for diffusion world models

diagrams.name: multiview_diffusion_model_training
diagrams.title: Multiview Diffusion Model Training
diagrams.description: Training a base multiview diffusion model including loss computation and batch sampling

diagrams.name: extended_multiview_model_training
diagrams.title: Extended Multiview Model Training
diagrams.description: Training the extended (video-conditioned) multiview model with latent conditioning

diagrams.name: diffusion_noise_and_denoising
diagrams.title: Diffusion Noise Scheduling & Denoising
diagrams.description: System applies noise schedules and iterative denoising during training and inference
diagrams.scope: Core diffusion process: noise augmentation, epsilon prediction, sigma scheduling

diagrams.name: sampling_and_generation
diagrams.title: Sampling & Generation
diagrams.description: User triggers inference sampling to produce world video outputs from trained models
diagrams.scope: Inference entry point and sample generation

diagrams.name: position_embedding_computation
diagrams.title: Position Embedding Computation
diagrams.description: System computes positional encodings for multiview video tokens (RoPE, SinCos, axis-based)

diagrams.name: context_parallel_position_embedding
diagrams.title: Context Parallel Position Embedding
diagrams.description: System enables or disables context parallelism for distributed position embedding computation

diagrams.name: transformer_attention_mechanisms
diagrams.title: Transformer Attention Mechanisms
diagrams.description: System applies various attention strategies within DIT blocks (full, cross, memory-efficient)
diagrams.scope: Attention variants used in transformer blocks

diagrams.name: transformer_block_composition
diagrams.title: Transformer Block Composition
diagrams.description: System assembles transformer blocks with MLP, drop-path, and cross-attention for DIT networks

diagrams.name: mamba_state_space_model_blocks
diagrams.title: Mamba State Space Model Blocks
diagrams.description: System uses Mamba2 SSM blocks for efficient sequential processing within video models

diagrams.name: patch_embedding_and_tokenization
diagrams.title: Patch Embedding & Tokenization
diagrams.description: System splits image/video frames into patches and embeds them for transformer input

diagrams.name: 3d_convolution_upsampling
diagrams.title: 3D Convolution & Upsampling
diagrams.description: System applies factorized and multi-stage 3D transposed convolutions for spatial upsampling

diagrams.name: 3d_gaussian_rendering
diagrams.title: 3D Gaussian Rendering
diagrams.description: System renders 3D Gaussian splat scenes including deferred shading and patch-based rendering

diagrams.name: data_loading_and_dataset_management
diagrams.title: Data Loading & Dataset Management
diagrams.description: System loads, provides, and manages training datasets including fields and batch sampling
diagrams.scope: Training data pipeline and dataset abstractions

diagrams.name: checkpoint_and_model_management
diagrams.title: Checkpoint & Model Management
diagrams.description: Developer downloads and manages model checkpoints for Lyra, Gen3C, tokenizer, and guardrail models

diagrams.name: environment_setup_and_validation
diagrams.title: Environment Setup & Validation
diagrams.description: Developer sets up and validates the runtime environment and dependencies
diagrams.scope: Installation verification and environment health checks

diagrams.name: model_configuration_management
diagrams.title: Model Configuration Management
diagrams.description: ML Engineer configures multiview model architecture, hyperparameters, and training settings
diagrams.scope: Model and training configuration via config classes

diagrams.name: scene_visualization
diagrams.title: Scene Visualization & Dynamic Scene Merging
diagrams.description: User visualizes and merges dynamic 3D scenes from generated world outputs

diagrams.name: file_io_and_data_handlers
diagrams.title: File I/O & Data Handlers
diagrams.description: System reads and writes structured data files (CSV, TXT) for datasets and results
